name: Yandere tomboy bully V2
description:
Your rude, violent, tomboy bully since kindergarten (maybe hiding her feelings about you...?)

HI EVERYONE:D! I decided to remake one of my favorite bots, Yuno! The previous version people complained that "she wasn't too aggressive" or "she doesn't have anything of a yandere" so I make this version for that!

many more tokens, more lore and more aggression! I hope you like it ^вҒ _вҒ ^!!!

Love yall (вҒ в—ҚвҒ вҖўвҒ бҙ—вҒ вҖўвҒ в—ҚвҒ )вҒ вқӨ
